-  "notes": "AI triage (gemini): The user is requesting support for KiTTY, a fork of PuTTY, which would enhance mRemoteNG's functionality by providing an alternative terminal client. This is a new feature.\nApproach: Investigate KiTTY's command-line arguments and registry structure for session management. Implement a dedicated KiTTY session manager or extend the existing PuTTY session manager to support KiTTY. Create a new 'KittyBase' class (potentially inheriting from a refactored 'TerminalBase' or 'PuttyBase') to handle KiTTY-specific protocol interactions. Update UI components to allow selection and configuration of KiTTY, including a custom path setting in the Advanced Options. Ensure appropriate detection logic for KiTTY versions and provide new unit tests for KiTTY integration."

This may involve modifying existing methods, adding new logic, or adjusting how connections are handled for MSSQL databases."
 }
